entries.question: まだ解くべき問題は同じか
entries.answer: はい。next value slice は now updated by outcome-report too, but the remaining lifecycle commands still require the same native sync treatment.
entries.expectation_state: run, answer, and outcome-report now keep the main project-memory surfaces fresher automatically
entries.mismatch_state: signal, escalation-resolve, and later execution-stage flows are still outside the automatic self-hosting loop
entries.scale_direction: finish broad lifecycle-native project-memory sync before calling the self-hosting runtime natural

entries.question: まだ解くべき問題は同じか

entries.question: まだ解くべき問題は同じか
entries.answer: はい。v1.9.0 の release で covered lifecycle commands の self-hosting sync は成立した。次は alignment pulse、task triage、self-audit cadence を manual note ではなく runtime-native な運用へ進める段階です。
entries.expectation_state: v1.9.0 released with lifecycle-native memory refresh across the current covered command set
entries.mismatch_state: cadence-level operation is still weaker than command-level sync because task triage and self-audit are not yet naturally refreshed through the same runtime loop
entries.scale_direction: shift from command coverage to operating cadence coverage for the next self-hosting slice
